subject: Daily Report - March 18, 2026 - City Hall Renovation Phase 2
body:
James,

Daily Report for City Hall Renovation Phase 2
Date: March 18, 2026
Weather: Partly cloudy, 8°C
Temperature Range: 4°C - 12°C

Manpower on Site:
- Stronghold Contractors: 14 workers (4 carpenters, 3 laborers, 2 ironworkers, 2 electricians, 1 superintendent, 1 safety officer, 1 project engineer)
- Abatement Sub (SafeAir): 4 workers
- Elevator Sub (Otis): 2 workers

Work Completed Today:
1. Level 3 West Wing - Completed selective demolition of partition walls in rooms 305-310
2. Level 2 - Continued asbestos abatement in mechanical room (Day 2 of 5)
3. Level 1 - Seismic anchor installation Grid A-1 through A-12 complete
4. Elevator pit - Excavation on hold pending RFI-113 response and change order approval for soil conditions

Delays/Issues:
- Asbestos abatement in Level 2 mechanical room is proceeding slower than planned due to additional pipe insulation found behind duct chase
- RFI-113 (anchor bolt spacing) still outstanding - Level 3 retrofit cannot proceed

Material Deliveries:
- 200 LF of W10x22 for seismic bracing - received and stored in staging area
- Anchor bolt shipment (Hilti HIT-RE 500 V4) - 3 cases received

Safety:
- Zero incidents
- Toolbox talk: Working near asbestos abatement areas

Regards,
Linda Park, P.Eng.
Stronghold Contractors
